final:
module RefModule(
    input  wire RESET_B,
    input  wire D,
    input  wire GATE,
    output reg Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge GATE, negedge RESET_B or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!RESET_B) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (GATE) begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
